summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TradeNexus AI Trade Finance Engine, Risk Scoring Engine, and Revenue Model. All new features working perfectly with 100% backend API success rate and full frontend integration.
passed_tests: Exporter login (agrimax@export.in / exporter123) - successful authentication
Exporter Trade Financing page navigation and loading
Trade Financing stats cards display (Total Requests, Pending, Offers Received, Accepted)
Exporter Subscription page with 3 plans (Basic ₹9,999, Premium ₹24,999, Enterprise ₹49,999)
Subscription plan features and pricing display correctly
Current subscription status display (Premium plan, Active status)
Admin login (admin@tradenexus.com / admin123) - successful authentication
Admin Finance Requests page navigation and loading
Finance requests table with proper headers and data display
Finance request status management and NBFC offer recording
Admin Revenue Dashboard navigation and loading
Revenue summary cards (Total ₹1,20,999, Subscriptions ₹24,999, Deal Commission ₹0, Financing Commission ₹96,000)
Revenue records table showing subscription and financing transactions
Revenue Model section with 3 streams (SaaS Subscription, Deal Commission 1.5%, Financing Commission 3%)
API: GET /api/subscription/me returns correct subscription status
API: GET /api/revenue/summary returns accurate revenue breakdown
API: GET /api/finance-requests returns finance request data
Complete finance request workflow (creation, admin review, NBFC offer, exporter acceptance)
Risk scoring engine (Low risk: 22, Medium risk: 45 with proper categorization)
Subscription upgrade functionality (Basic to Premium)
Revenue tracking across all 3 streams (SaaS, Deal Commission, Financing Commission)
Trade Finance Engine backend APIs (15/15 tests passed)
Core TradeNexus APIs (25/25 tests passed from previous testing)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (40/40 total tests passed - 25 core + 15 trade finance)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI components and navigation working perfectly)
